name: JPNIC-LAB
name_long: Japan Network Information Center Network Security Experiment Network
notes:
This network is for the network security experiments and researches operated by Japan Network Information Center, JPNIC/AS2515.
This AS advertises prefixes including prefixes used for study which should result to each status in RPKI ROV.

The intended ROV Invalid prefixes are as follows:
- 202.1.213.0/24
- 2407:9900:1000::/36

Peers are requested to accept these routes into adj-RIB-in but can also drop them from FIB by ROV.

Check out https://rov-check.nic.ad.jp/en for more information.
